result.title: A programmable dual-RNA-guided DNA endonuclease in adaptive bacterial immunity.
result.authorString: Jinek M, Chylinski K, Fonfara I, Hauer M, Doudna JA, Charpentier E.
result.abstractText: CRISPR-Cas systems provide bacteria and archaea with adaptive immunity against viruses and plasmids.

result.title: Search and sequence analysis tools for biomedical literature.
result.abstractText: We describe a suite of tools for retrieving and analyzing biomedical text.
